reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the Simpsons episode whose teleplay Jennifer Ventimilia co-wrote.
2. Determine which season of The Simpsons includes that episode and return the season.
original_final_question: Jennifer Ventimilia co-wrote the teleplay of the episode that was part of which season of The Simpsons? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which Simpsons episode had a teleplay co-written by Jennifer Ventimilia? Evidence: Jennifer Ventimilia: Ventimilia co-wrote "The Simpsons" episode "Simpson Tide" (with Joshua Sternin) and the teleplay of the episode "'Round Springfield", based on a story idea by Al Jean and Mike Reiss. -> 'Round Springfield
Node 2: Which season of The Simpsons includes that episode? Evidence: 'Round Springfield: "'Round Springfield" is the 22nd episode of "The Simpsons"' sixth season. -> sixth season
